# Nextel Connect

Official domain: https://nextelwebsite.com/

Nextel Connect is a regulated, NCC-compliant virtual telecom service provider in Nigeria, registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC) under Business Name Registration No. 9628017. Nextel issues eSIMs that pay subscribers daily for calls, SMS, personal website traffic, saved contacts, referrals, and network turnover.

Important pages:
- Home: https://nextelwebsite.com/
- Is Nextel Legit? Platform Guide: https://nextelwebsite.com/nextel-platform.html
- How to Register for Nextel: https://nextelwebsite.com/how-to-register.html
- Nextel Registration Form: https://nextelwebsite.com/register.html
- Nextel Signup: https://nextelwebsite.com/signup.html
- Get Started: https://nextelwebsite.com/get-started.html
- Payment Guide (Diamond & Royal): https://nextelwebsite.com/payments.html
- Upgrade to Royal eSIM: https://nextelwebsite.com/upgrade.html
- Nextel Cloud Dashboard: https://nextelwebsite.com/nextel-cloud.html
- Privacy Policy: https://nextelwebsite.com/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of Use: https://nextelwebsite.com/terms-of-use.html
- Disclaimer: https://nextelwebsite.com/disclaimer.html

Plans:
- Diamond eSIM: ₦10,500 one-time activation, ₦8,000 connect bonus, local roaming, SMS reward ₦6–₦20, WebGain ₦7–₦20 per visit, 0.4% turnover commission.
- Royal eSIM: ₦17,500 one-time activation, ₦14,000 connect bonus, Global Roaming, calls reward ₦288–₦628/min, SMS reward ₦13–₦83, WebGain ₦15–₦50 per visit, saved contacts ₦72 each, 1% turnover commission.

- Nextel website

Safety guidance:
Users should confirm they are on nextelwebsite.com, only trust the official Telegram (t.me/m/NMX8U16LMGE0), Instagram (@nextelofficial), TikTok (@nextelofficial) and Info@nextelconnect contact channels listed in the site footer, keep withdrawal and payment proof, and avoid unofficial links or impersonators requesting payment outside these channels.
